body.title: Enable IGOR_SURPRISE_REWARD + add metrics to measure its effect
body.result: Enabled IGOR_SURPRISE_REWARD_ENABLED by default (changed default from false→true in word_graph.surprise_scale()). Promoted surprise log from DEBUG→INFO in basal_ganglia.py so every surprise reinforcement event is visible in logs. Search for 'SURPRISE_REWARD' in igor.log to measure frequency after 2 weeks. Disable via IGOR_SURPRISE_REWARD_ENABLED=false in .env if needed.
body.description: self_trainer.py surprise reward (IGOR_SURPRISE_REWARD_ENABLED) is gated OFF by default and metrics are never measured. The reinforce() call with flatness=1.0 surprise bonus exists but is never activated. Fix: (1) enable in production .env; (2) log surprise_scale() output per reinforce call to costs.log; (3) measure habit-firing correlation with flatness=1.0 queries for 2 weeks then review. ML finding from deep-audit Panel 8.
